---
title: "Juglans"
toc: true
---


<!-- This file is generated by scripts/generate_tree_list.py. Do not edit this file directly; update the generator or the underlying data sources instead. -->

**Family:** [Juglandaceae](/trees/family/juglandaceae.html)

## Planting summary

| Species | Trees | Planted locations |
|---|---:|---|
| [English Walnut](/trees/species/english-walnut.html) | 1 | — |
